channel.title: Comments for page "Antarctic Exchange Hub"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Antarctic Exchange Hub"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This canon has the requisite additional authors and has received the tag "antarctic-exchange". Please use this tag on any future Tales in this canon.

item.title: Regarding the whole thing:
item.content:encoded:
You had me at "Giant Carnivorous Penguins". And then I read the entries.

I like them, taken as a whole, enough that I have concerns re: embarrassing myself if I elaborate on that sentiment, so I'll just say "Well writ. More, much much more, please."

+1 to everything associated with this canon.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Here we go, the hub page for the Antarctic Exchange. We are in business.

Thanks to all who enjoyed reading our tales, and extra preemptive thanks to anyone who wants to add to this.

e: I will stab you, Wikidot bullet formatting.
